summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BOM architectural refactoring. All 11 requested features verified working correctly. Backend: 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/bom/{bom_id} returns servicio_produccion_id and servicio_nombre for SERVICIO lines
Backend: PUT /api/bom/{bom_id}/lineas/{linea_id} updates servicio_produccion_id for SERVICIO lines
Backend: GET /api/bom/{bom_id}/costo-estandar uses servicio_tarifa (or costo_manual) for SERVICIO lines pricing
Backend: GET /api/registros/{registro_id}/estados-disponibles returns estados from ruta etapas with usa_ruta=true (Corte, Costura from Pantalon Denim)
Backend: POST /api/rutas-produccion accepts etapas with nombre and optional servicio_id
Backend: GET /api/rutas-produccion returns etapas with nombre field populated
Backend: TELA/AVIO BOM lines use inventario_id correctly
Backend: costo_manual editable and saved per SERVICIO line
Frontend BOM: 6 tipo selectors present, 4 servicio selectors (for SERVICIO lines)
Frontend BOM: 4 costo-manual editable inputs (for SERVICIO lines with values 10, 8.5, 6.5, 1.2)
Frontend BOM: 2 costo-inv readonly displays (for TELA/AVIO lines showing S/ 15.00, S/ 1.00)
Frontend BOM: SERVICIO lines show dropdown selector for servicios_produccion (Corte, Costura, Lavanderia, Acabado)
Frontend BOM: TELA/AVIO lines show InventarioCombobox for item selection
Frontend BOM: Add buttons present for all tipos (Tela, Avio, Servicio, Empaque, Otro)
Frontend BOM: Legend explains: Servicios use Servicios de Producción catalog, costo editable manually per line
Frontend Rutas: Editor shows Nombre input + optional Servicio selector per etapa
Frontend Rutas: Existing ruta 'Pantalon Denim' shows etapas Corte → Costura as badges
Frontend Inventario: Category dropdown shows ONLY Telas, Avios, Otros - 'Servicios' is NOT available (as required)
Frontend Registro: Estado shows 'Para Corte' (from ruta etapas)
critical_code_review_comments: Backend bom.py correctly separates SERVICIO lines (using servicio_produccion_id) from material lines (using inventario_id)
Backend estados-disponibles correctly reads from ruta etapas when usa_ruta=true
Backend rutas-produccion correctly stores and returns etapas with nombre + optional servicio_id
Frontend ModelosBOM.jsx correctly distinguishes between SERVICIO (servicio dropdown) and non-SERVICIO (InventarioCombobox)
Frontend Inventario.jsx CATEGORIAS array correctly excludes 'Servicios' - only Telas, Avios, Otros available
Frontend RutasProduccion.jsx correctly allows adding etapas with custom nombre and optional servicio link
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: BOM 2a7a6511-89f4-4a2f-a987-745c8df37842 (BOM-EDUARD-V1), Registro c74d3460-3e8b-4d4c-88e5-06bff012d6f5 (Corte #01), Ruta 'Pantalon Denim' with etapas Corte, Costura
context_for_next_testing_agent: BOM refactoring complete: SERVICIO lines use servicio_produccion_id (not inventario_id). Estados come from ruta etapas when usa_ruta=true. Ruta etapas have nombre + optional servicio_id. Inventario 'Servicios' category removed from frontend. costo_manual editable for SERVICIO lines.
